title: Influence component / finished moves generated by a manufacturing order
reuse_advice: Override mrp.production._get_moves_raw_values / _get_moves_finished_values to shape the generated stock.move vals; don't override _generate_moves wholesale or write() after.
when_not_enough: move generation outside the standard BoM explosion path

title: BoM explosion and selection (phantom/kits, applicable BoM)
reuse_advice: Use mrp.bom.explode(product, qty) for the fully-nested component set (handles phantom/kit), and _bom_find for selection. Don't hardcode a bom_id or flatten kits yourself.
when_not_enough: a configurator that picks components by logic no BoM variant can express

title: React to manufacturing completion (mark done / post inventory)
intents: sau khi đánh dấu hoàn thành
reuse_advice: Extend mrp.production._post_inventory / button_mark_done (call super()) to react after completion. Note partial qty_producing spawns a backorder MO that runs your code again.
when_not_enough: per-workorder logic when mrp_workorder is installed (different entry points)
